THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACH, STUART JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 835 HYDE ST, #305, STAYED UNTIL APR-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT.
